post_dataforseo_backlinks_anchors_live.desc_en: Returns the anchor texts used in backlinks pointing to a target, each with aggregated link and referring-domain metrics. Use it to analyse anchor-text distribution and spot over-optimised or branded anchors.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_anchors_live.description_zh: 返回指向目标的外链所用的锚文本列表，每条附带外链与引荐域名的聚合指标，用于分析锚文本分布、识别过度优化或品牌词锚文本。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_backlinks_live.desc_en: Returns the individual backlinks pointing to a target with full per-link detail (source page, anchor, attributes, ranks, status). The core endpoint for inspecting a target's link profile link by link.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_backlinks_live.description_zh: 返回指向目标的逐条外链明细（来源页、锚文本、属性、rank、状态等），是逐条审视目标链接画像的核心接口。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_backlinks.desc_en: Returns the total backlink count for up to 1000 targets in a single request — a fast way to compare link volume across many domains or pages.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_backlinks.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的外链总数，用于快速横比多个域名或页面的外链体量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.heading_zh: 批量获取新增与丢失外链数 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_backlinks_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.desc_en: Returns the number of newly gained and lost backlinks since a given date for up to 1000 targets, for tracking link velocity in bulk.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.description_zh: 返回多达 1000 个目标自指定日期以来新增与丢失的外链数量，用于批量跟踪外链增减趋势。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.heading_zh: 批量获取新增与丢失引荐域名数 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_referring_domains_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.desc_en: Returns the count of newly gained and lost referring domains (and main domains) since a given date for up to 1000 targets.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.description_zh: 返回多达 1000 个目标自指定日期以来新增与丢失的引荐域名（及主域名）数量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.heading_zh: 批量获取页面外链摘要 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.desc_en: Returns a compact backlink summary (rank, link and referring counts) per target for up to 1000 pages/domains at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个页面/域名的外链摘要（rank、外链与引荐计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_ranks_liv.desc_en: Returns the backlink-based rank for up to 1000 targets in a single request, for bulk authority comparison.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_ranks_liv.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标基于外链的 rank，用于批量比较权重。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_referring.desc_en: Returns referring-domain and main-domain counts (total and nofollow) for up to 1000 targets at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_referring.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的引荐域名与主域名数量（含 nofollow 计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_spam_scor.desc_en: Returns the backlink spam score for up to 1000 targets, for bulk link-quality screening.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_spam_scor.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的外链垃圾分，用于批量筛查链接质量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_competitors_li.desc_en: Returns domains that share referring domains with the target — i.e. likely backlink competitors — ranked by how many referrers they have in common.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_competitors_li.description_zh: 返回与目标共享引荐域名的域名（即潜在外链竞争对手），按共有引荐方数量排序。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_interse.desc_en: Returns referring domains that link to several of the specified targets, with per-target metrics — useful for finding shared link sources across competitors.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_interse.description_zh: 返回同时链向多个指定目标的引荐域名，并给出各目标的指标，便于发现竞争对手间共有的链接来源。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_l.desc_en: Returns the pages of a domain that have backlinks, each with page metadata and a per-page backlink summary — useful for finding the most-linked pages of a site.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_l.description_zh: 返回某域名下有外链的页面，每条附带页面元信息和该页的外链摘要，便于找出站点中被链接最多的页面。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.heading_zh: 获取域名页面外链摘要 post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.desc_en: Returns a per-page backlink summary (rank, link and referring counts) for the linked pages of a target domain.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.description_zh: 返回目标域名下被链接页面的逐页外链摘要（rank、外链与引荐计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_history_live.desc_en: Returns a time series of a domain's overall backlink metrics within a date range, for tracking how its link profile evolved.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_history_live.description_zh: 返回某域名在指定日期范围内整体外链指标的时间序列，用于跟踪其链接画像的演变。

get_dataforseo_backlinks_index.desc_en: Returns the current size of the DataForSEO backlink index (total backlinks, pages, domains) plus its growth history. Takes no parameters.
get_dataforseo_backlinks_index.description_zh: 返回 DataForSEO 外链索引的当前规模（外链、页面、域名总数）及其增长历史，无需任何参数。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_page_intersect.desc_en: Returns backlinks whose source pages link to several of the specified targets, with full per-link detail — for finding pages that link to multiple competitors at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_page_intersect.description_zh: 返回来源页同时链向多个指定目标的外链，并给出逐条明细，用于找出同时链向多个竞品的页面。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_doma.desc_en: Returns the domains that link to a target, each with aggregated backlink metrics — the standard way to audit who links to a site at domain granularity.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_doma.description_zh: 返回链向目标的引荐域名列表，每条附带聚合外链指标，是按域名粒度审计「谁链向站点」的标准方式。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_netw.desc_en: Returns the IP networks or subnets that backlinks originate from, with aggregated metrics — useful for detecting link networks and IP diversity.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_netw.description_zh: 返回外链来源的 IP 网络或子网及其聚合指标，便于识别链接网络与 IP 多样性。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_summary_live.desc_en: Returns a single aggregated snapshot of a target's entire backlink profile (rank, counts, spam score, host info). The go-to overview endpoint for one target.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_summary_live.description_zh: 返回目标整体外链画像的单条聚合快照（rank、各类计数、垃圾分、主机信息），是针对单一目标的总览首选接口。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.heading_zh: 获取新增丢失时间序列汇总 post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new_lost_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.desc_en: Returns a time series of newly gained and lost backlinks and referring domains for a target, bucketed by the chosen range.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.description_zh: 返回目标新增与丢失外链及引荐域名的时间序列，按指定粒度分桶。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.heading_zh: 获取外链时间序列汇总 post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.desc_en: Returns a time series of a target's aggregated backlink metrics (rank, backlinks, referring domains/pages) bucketed by the chosen range.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.description_zh: 返回目标聚合外链指标（rank、外链、引荐域名/页面）的时间序列，按指定粒度分桶。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.

cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in this response.
tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, one per requested task, each carrying its own status and result.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the task, usable to retrieve it later.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.anchor.desc_en: The anchor text used by the backlink(s); for the backlinks endpoint, the clickable text of this link.
tasks.result.items.anchor.title_zh: 外链所用的锚文本；在外链明细接口中即该链接的可点击文字。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

mode.desc_en: Grouping of the returned backlinks: `as_is` returns every backlink, `one_per_domain` keeps one per referring domain, `one_per_anchor` keeps one per anchor text.
mode.title_zh: 返回外链的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部，`one_per_domain` 每个引荐域名保留一条，`one_per_anchor` 每种锚文本保留一条。

custom_mode.desc_en: Fine-grained grouping that returns a fixed number of backlinks per chosen field; when set it overrides `mode`.
custom_mode.title_zh: 更精细的分组，按指定字段返回固定条数的外链；设置后将覆盖 `mode`。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

search_after_token.desc_en: Continuation token for deep pagination beyond the 20,000-result offset cap. Pass the token from the previous response, keeping all other parameters identical, to fetch the next page.
search_after_token.title_zh: 用于突破 20,000 条偏移上限的深翻页续传令牌。传入上一次响应返回的令牌（其余参数须保持一致）即可取下一页。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.mode.desc_en: Grouping mode that was applied to these results, echoing the request.
tasks.result.mode.title_zh: 应用于这些结果的分组模式，回显请求。

tasks.result.custom_mode.desc_en: Custom grouping that was applied, echoing the request.
tasks.result.custom_mode.title_zh: 应用的自定义分组，回显请求。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.domain_from.desc_en: Domain of the page that hosts the backlink (the source).
tasks.result.items.domain_from.title_zh: 承载该外链的来源页面所在域名。

tasks.result.items.url_from.desc_en: Full URL of the source page that contains the backlink.
tasks.result.items.url_from.title_zh: 包含该外链的来源页面完整 URL。

tasks.result.items.url_from_https.desc_en: Whether the source URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.items.url_from_https.title_zh: 来源 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.items.domain_to.desc_en: Domain the backlink points to (the target side).
tasks.result.items.domain_to.title_zh: 该外链所指向的目标侧域名。

tasks.result.items.url_to.desc_en: Full URL the backlink points to.
tasks.result.items.url_to.title_zh: 该外链指向的完整 URL。

tasks.result.items.url_to_https.desc_en: Whether the destination URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.items.url_to_https.title_zh: 目标 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.items.tld_from.desc_en: Top-level domain of the source page.

tasks.result.items.is_new.desc_en: Whether this backlink was newly discovered in the latest check.
tasks.result.items.is_new.title_zh: 该外链是否为最近一次检测新发现。

tasks.result.items.is_lost.desc_en: Whether this backlink has been detected as lost.
tasks.result.items.is_lost.title_zh: 该外链是否已被检测为丢失。

tasks.result.items.backlink_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of this individual backlink; higher values flag a riskier source.
tasks.result.items.backlink_spam_score.title_zh: 该条外链的垃圾分，越高表示来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.page_from_rank.desc_en: Authority score of the source page, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.page_from_rank.title_zh: 来源页面的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_rank.desc_en: Authority score of the source domain, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_rank.title_zh: 来源域名的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_platform_.desc_en: Platform type(s) detected for the source domain (e.g. cms, blogs).
tasks.result.items.domain_from_platform_.title_zh: 来源域名检测到的平台类型（如 cms、blogs）。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_is_ip.desc_en: Whether the source is addressed by a bare IP rather than a domain name.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_is_ip.title_zh: 来源是否以裸 IP（而非域名）寻址。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_ip.desc_en: IP address of the source domain.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_ip.title_zh: 来源域名的 IP 地址。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_country.desc_en: Country associated with the source domain.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_country.title_zh: 来源域名关联的国家/地区。

tasks.result.items.page_from_external_li.desc_en: Number of external links on the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_external_li.title_zh: 来源页面上的外部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.page_from_internal_li.desc_en: Number of internal links on the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_internal_li.title_zh: 来源页面上的内部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.page_from_size.desc_en: Size of the source page in bytes.

tasks.result.items.page_from_encoding.desc_en: Character encoding of the source page.

tasks.result.items.page_from_language.desc_en: Detected language of the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_language.title_zh: 来源页面检测到的语言。

tasks.result.items.page_from_status_code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the source page when last fetched.
tasks.result.items.page_from_status_code.title_zh: 最近一次抓取来源页面返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.prev_seen.desc_en: Date of the previous time the entity was seen before the most recent check.
tasks.result.items.prev_seen.title_zh: 最近一次检测之前，该实体上一次被发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.last_seen.desc_en: Most recent date the entity was confirmed present.
tasks.result.items.last_seen.title_zh: 该实体最近一次被确认存在的日期。

tasks.result.items.item_type.desc_en: Specific type of this backlink record (e.g. anchor, redirect, image).
tasks.result.items.item_type.title_zh: 该外链记录的具体类型（如锚文本、重定向、图片）。

tasks.result.items.attributes.desc_en: HTML rel attributes of the link (e.g. nofollow, ugc, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.attributes.title_zh: 链接的 HTML rel 属性（如 nofollow、ugc、sponsored）。

tasks.result.items.dofollow.desc_en: Whether the link passes authority (true = dofollow, false = nofollow).
tasks.result.items.dofollow.title_zh: 该链接是否传递权重（true 为 dofollow，false 为 nofollow）。

tasks.result.items.original.desc_en: Whether this is the original link as opposed to a duplicate occurrence.
tasks.result.items.original.title_zh: 该链接是否为原始链接（而非重复出现）。

tasks.result.items.alt.desc_en: Alt text of the link when it is an image link.
tasks.result.items.alt.title_zh: 图片链接时该链接的 alt 文本。

tasks.result.items.image_url.desc_en: URL of the image when the backlink is an image link.
tasks.result.items.image_url.title_zh: 图片外链时所用图片的 URL。

tasks.result.items.anchor.desc_en: The anchor text used by the backlink(s); for the backlinks endpoint, the clickable text of this link.
tasks.result.items.anchor.title_zh: 外链所用的锚文本；在外链明细接口中即该链接的可点击文字。

tasks.result.items.text_pre.desc_en: Text appearing immediately before the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.items.text_pre.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本前紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.items.text_post.desc_en: Text appearing immediately after the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.items.text_post.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本后紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.items.semantic_location.desc_en: Semantic location of the link on the source page (e.g. content, header, footer).
tasks.result.items.semantic_location.title_zh: 链接在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页眉、页脚）。

tasks.result.items.links_count.desc_en: Number of links from the source page to the target.
tasks.result.items.links_count.title_zh: 来源页面指向目标的链接数量。

tasks.result.items.group_count.desc_en: Number of grouped duplicate links represented by this record.
tasks.result.items.group_count.title_zh: 该记录所代表的合并重复链接数量。

tasks.result.items.is_broken.desc_en: Whether the link is broken (its destination does not resolve).
tasks.result.items.is_broken.title_zh: 该链接是否失效（目标无法访问）。

tasks.result.items.url_to_status_code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the destination URL.
tasks.result.items.url_to_status_code.title_zh: 目标 URL 返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.url_to_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of the destination URL.
tasks.result.items.url_to_spam_score.title_zh: 目标 URL 的垃圾分。

tasks.result.items.url_to_redirect_targe.desc_en: Final URL the destination redirects to, if any.
tasks.result.items.url_to_redirect_targe.title_zh: 目标若发生重定向，则最终跳转到的 URL。

tasks.result.items.is_indirect_link.desc_en: Whether the link reaches the target indirectly via a redirect or canonical chain.
tasks.result.items.is_indirect_link.title_zh: 该链接是否经由重定向或 canonical 链间接到达目标。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.desc_en: The redirect/canonical hops the indirect link passes through to reach the target.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.title_zh: 间接链接到达目标所经过的重定向/canonical 跳转路径。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ty.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ty.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.st.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.st.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ur.desc_en: URL of the page this item describes.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ur.title_zh: 该条目所描述页面的 URL。

tasks.result.search_after_token.desc_en: Token to pass as `search_after_token` in the next request to continue deep pagination.
tasks.result.search_after_token.title_zh: 用于下一次请求作为 `search_after_token` 续传深翻页的令牌。

tasks.result.items.url.desc_en: URL of the page this item describes.
tasks.result.items.url.title_zh: 该条目所描述页面的 URL。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.main_domain_rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity's main domain, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.main_domain_rank.title_zh: 该实体所属主域名基于外链的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.target.desc_en: The target this row reports on, echoing one of the requested `targets`.
tasks.result.items.target.title_zh: 该行所统计的目标，回显请求 `targets` 中的某一项。

tasks.result.items.spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of the target's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.spam_score.title_zh: 目标外链画像的垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading competitor domains to skip before returning results, for paging with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的竞争对手域名条数，与 `limit` 配合翻页。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

main_domain.desc_en: When true, only the main domain of the target is considered when searching for competitors.
main_domain.title_zh: 为 true 时仅以目标的主域名参与竞争对手检索。

exclude_large_domains.desc_en: When true, very large generic domains (e.g. google.com, amazon.com) are omitted from competitor results.
exclude_large_domains.title_zh: 为 true 时从竞争对手结果中剔除超大型通用域名（如 google.com、amazon.com）。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.target.desc_en: The target this row reports on, echoing one of the requested `targets`.
tasks.result.items.target.title_zh: 该行所统计的目标，回显请求 `targets` 中的某一项。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.intersections.desc_en: Number of referring domains this competitor shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.intersections.title_zh: 该竞争对手与目标共有的引荐域名数量。

targets.desc_en: Set of domains, subdomains or webpages to query in one bulk request, each formatted the same way as `target`.
targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

exclude_targets.desc_en: Targets to exclude: results keep only referrers that link to `targets` but not to any entry here, useful for finding link gaps unique to your set.
exclude_targets.title_zh: 要排除的目标：结果只保留链向 `targets` 但不链向本列表任一项的引荐方，便于发现专属于目标集的链接缺口。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

intersection_mode.desc_en: How results across the specified targets are combined: `all` bases results on all backlinks, `partial` only on backlinks shared across targets.
intersection_mode.title_zh: 多个目标结果的合并方式：`all` 基于全部外链，`partial` 仅基于目标间共有的外链。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.domain_intersection.desc_en: Per-target backlink metrics for this shared referring domain, keyed by target index.
tasks.result.items.domain_intersection.title_zh: 该共有引荐域名对各目标的外链指标，按目标序号索引。

tasks.result.items.1.desc_en: Per-target block keyed by the target's index in the request (e.g. `1`, `2`).
tasks.result.items.1.title_zh: 按目标在请求中的序号（如 `1`、`2`）索引的分目标数据块。

tasks.result.items.1.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.1.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.1.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.items.1.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.items.1.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.1.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.1.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.1.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.1.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.1.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.1.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.1.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.1.backlinks_spam_scor.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.1.backlinks_spam_scor.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.1.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.1.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.1.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.1.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_domains_n.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_domains_n.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_main_doma.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_main_doma.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_main_doma.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_main_doma.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_typ.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_typ.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_att.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_att.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_pla.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_pla.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_sem.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_sem.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_cou.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_links_cou.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.items.1.referring_pages_nof.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.1.referring_pages_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

tasks.result.items.summary.desc_en: Roll-up of intersection statistics for this item.
tasks.result.items.summary.title_zh: 该条目交集统计的汇总。

tasks.result.items.intersections_count.desc_en: Number of targets this item intersects with.
tasks.result.items.intersections_count.title_zh: 该条目所交集的目标数量。

target.desc_en: Domain or subdomain whose indexed pages you want, specified without `http(s)://` and without `www.`.
target.title_zh: 要查询已收录页面的域名或子域名，去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.` 填写。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.

tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the task, usable to retrieve it later.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.domain.desc_en: The referring domain that links to the target.

tasks.result.items.page.desc_en: Path or URL of the page within the domain.
tasks.result.items.page.title_zh: 该页面在域名内的路径或 URL。

tasks.result.items.ip.title_zh: 承载该页面的 IP 地址。

tasks.result.items.first_visited.desc_en: Date the page was first crawled.
tasks.result.items.first_visited.title_zh: 该页面首次被抓取的日期。

tasks.result.items.prev_visited.desc_en: Date the page was crawled before the most recent visit.
tasks.result.items.prev_visited.title_zh: 最近一次抓取之前该页面上一次被抓取的日期。

tasks.result.items.fetch_time.desc_en: Timestamp of the most recent crawl of the page.
tasks.result.items.fetch_time.title_zh: 该页面最近一次抓取的时间。

tasks.result.items.status code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the page on the last crawl.
tasks.result.items.status code.title_zh: 最近一次抓取页面返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.location.desc_en: Redirect Location header value when the page redirects.
tasks.result.items.location.title_zh: 页面发生重定向时的 Location 头取值。

tasks.result.items.size.desc_en: Size of the page in bytes.

tasks.result.items.encoded_size.desc_en: Compressed (transfer) size of the page in bytes.
tasks.result.items.encoded_size.title_zh: 该页面压缩（传输）后的字节大小。

tasks.result.items.content_encoding.desc_en: Content-Encoding (compression) used to serve the page.
tasks.result.items.content_encoding.title_zh: 页面传输所用的 Content-Encoding（压缩方式）。

tasks.result.items.server.desc_en: Web server software reported for the host.
tasks.result.items.server.title_zh: 主机上报的 Web 服务器软件。

tasks.result.items.meta.desc_en: On-page metadata extracted from the crawled page.
tasks.result.items.meta.title_zh: 从抓取页面提取的页面元信息。

tasks.result.items.meta.title.desc_en: Page title extracted from the crawled page.
tasks.result.items.meta.title.title_zh: 从抓取页面提取的标题。

tasks.result.items.meta.canonical.desc_en: Canonical URL declared by the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.canonical.title_zh: 该页面声明的 canonical URL。

tasks.result.items.meta.internal_links_c.desc_en: Number of internal links on the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.internal_links_c.title_zh: 页面上的内部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.meta.external_links_c.desc_en: Number of external links on the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.external_links_c.title_zh: 页面上的外部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.meta.images_count.desc_en: Number of images on the page.

tasks.result.items.meta.words_count.desc_en: Number of words in the page content.

tasks.result.items.meta.page_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score computed for this individual page.
tasks.result.items.meta.page_spam_score.title_zh: 针对该单个页面计算的垃圾分。

tasks.result.items.meta.social_media_tag.desc_en: Social media meta tags (e.g. Open Graph, Twitter Card) found on the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.social_media_tag.title_zh: 页面上发现的社交媒体元标签（如 Open Graph、Twitter Card）。

tasks.result.items.meta.h1.desc_en: H1 headings extracted from the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.h1.title_zh: 从页面提取的 H1 标题。

tasks.result.items.meta.h2.desc_en: H2 headings extracted from the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.h2.title_zh: 从页面提取的 H2 标题。

tasks.result.items.meta.h3.desc_en: H3 headings extracted from the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.h3.title_zh: 从页面提取的 H3 标题。

tasks.result.items.meta.images_alt.desc_en: Alt texts of images on the page.
tasks.result.items.meta.images_alt.title_zh: 页面上图片的 alt 文本。

tasks.result.items.meta.powered_by.desc_en: Technologies the page reports being powered by.

tasks.result.items.meta.charset.desc_en: Character set declared by the page.

tasks.result.items.meta.platform_type.desc_en: Platform type(s) detected for the page (e.g. cms, blogs).
tasks.result.items.meta.platform_type.title_zh: 页面检测到的平台类型（如 cms、blogs）。

tasks.result.items.meta.technologies.desc_en: Detected technology stack of the page, grouped by category.
tasks.result.items.meta.technologies.title_zh: 页面检测到的技术栈，按类别分组。

tasks.result.items.meta.technologies.cms.title_zh: 检测到的内容管理系统（CMS）。

tasks.result.items.meta.technologies.cdn.title_zh: 检测到的内容分发网络（CDN）。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.desc_en: Backlink summary metrics for this individual page.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.title_zh: 该单个页面的外链汇总指标。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.first_se.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.first_se.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.lost_dat.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.lost_dat.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.backlink.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.backlink.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.backlink.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.backlink.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.broken_b.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.broken_b.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.broken_p.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.broken_p.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.page_summary.referrin.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

exclude_targets.desc_en: Targets to exclude: results keep only referrers that link to `targets` but not to any entry here, useful for finding link gaps unique to your set.
exclude_targets.title_zh: 要排除的目标：结果只保留链向 `targets` 但不链向本列表任一项的引荐方，便于发现专属于目标集的链接缺口。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

intersection_mode.desc_en: How results across the specified targets are combined: `all` bases results on all backlinks, `partial` only on backlinks shared across targets.
intersection_mode.title_zh: 多个目标结果的合并方式：`all` 基于全部外链，`partial` 仅基于目标间共有的外链。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.targets.desc_en: The set of targets this intersection result was computed across.
tasks.result.targets.title_zh: 该交集结果所基于的一组目标。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.page_intersection.desc_en: The backlink shared across targets, keyed by target index, with full per-link detail.
tasks.result.page_intersection.title_zh: 跨目标共有的外链，按目标序号索引，附带逐条明细。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.desc_en: Per-target block keyed by the target's index in the request (e.g. `1`, `2`).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.title_zh: 按目标在请求中的序号（如 `1`、`2`）索引的分目标数据块。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Domain of the page that hosts the backlink (the source).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 承载该外链的来源页面所在域名。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_fro.desc_en: Full URL of the source page that contains the backlink.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_fro.title_zh: 包含该外链的来源页面完整 URL。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_fro.desc_en: Whether the source URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_fro.title_zh: 来源 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Domain the backlink points to (the target side).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 该外链所指向的目标侧域名。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to.desc_en: Full URL the backlink points to.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to.title_zh: 该外链指向的完整 URL。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.desc_en: Whether the destination URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.title_zh: 目标 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.tld_fro.desc_en: Top-level domain of the source page.

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_new.desc_en: Whether this backlink was newly discovered in the latest check.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_new.title_zh: 该外链是否为最近一次检测新发现。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_lost.desc_en: Whether this backlink has been detected as lost.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_lost.title_zh: 该外链是否已被检测为丢失。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.backlin.desc_en: Spam score of this individual backlink; higher values flag a riskier source.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.backlin.title_zh: 该条外链的垃圾分，越高表示来源风险越大。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.desc_en: Authority score of the source page, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.title_zh: 来源页面的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Authority score of the source domain, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 来源域名的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Platform type(s) detected for the source domain (e.g. cms, blogs).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 来源域名检测到的平台类型（如 cms、blogs）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Whether the source is addressed by a bare IP rather than a domain name.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 来源是否以裸 IP（而非域名）寻址。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: IP address of the source domain.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 来源域名的 IP 地址。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.desc_en: Country associated with the source domain.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.domain_.title_zh: 来源域名关联的国家/地区。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.desc_en: Number of external links on the source page.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.title_zh: 来源页面上的外部链接数量。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.desc_en: Number of internal links on the source page.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.title_zh: 来源页面上的内部链接数量。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.desc_en: Size of the source page in bytes.
Character encoding of the source page.
Detected language of the source page.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.title_zh: 来源页面检测到的语言。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the source page when last fetched.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.page_fr.title_zh: 最近一次抓取来源页面返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.first_s.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.first_s.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.prev_se.desc_en: Date of the previous time the entity was seen before the most recent check.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.prev_se.title_zh: 最近一次检测之前，该实体上一次被发现的日期。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.last_se.desc_en: Most recent date the entity was confirmed present.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.last_se.title_zh: 该实体最近一次被确认存在的日期。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.item_ty.desc_en: Specific type of this backlink record (e.g. anchor, redirect, image).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.item_ty.title_zh: 该外链记录的具体类型（如锚文本、重定向、图片）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.attribu.desc_en: HTML rel attributes of the link (e.g. nofollow, ugc, sponsored).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.attribu.title_zh: 链接的 HTML rel 属性（如 nofollow、ugc、sponsored）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.dofollo.desc_en: Whether the link passes authority (true = dofollow, false = nofollow).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.dofollo.title_zh: 该链接是否传递权重（true 为 dofollow，false 为 nofollow）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.origina.desc_en: Whether this is the original link as opposed to a duplicate occurrence.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.origina.title_zh: 该链接是否为原始链接（而非重复出现）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.alt.desc_en: Alt text of the link when it is an image link.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.alt.title_zh: 图片链接时该链接的 alt 文本。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.anchor.desc_en: The anchor text used by the backlink(s); for the backlinks endpoint, the clickable text of this link.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.anchor.title_zh: 外链所用的锚文本；在外链明细接口中即该链接的可点击文字。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.text_pr.desc_en: Text appearing immediately before the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.text_pr.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本前紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.text_po.desc_en: Text appearing immediately after the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.text_po.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本后紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.semanti.desc_en: Semantic location of the link on the source page (e.g. content, header, footer).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.semanti.title_zh: 链接在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页眉、页脚）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.links_c.desc_en: Number of links from the source page to the target.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.links_c.title_zh: 来源页面指向目标的链接数量。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.group_c.desc_en: Number of grouped duplicate links represented by this record.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.group_c.title_zh: 该记录所代表的合并重复链接数量。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_brok.desc_en: Whether the link is broken (its destination does not resolve).
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_brok.title_zh: 该链接是否失效（目标无法访问）。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the destination URL.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.title_zh: 目标 URL 返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.desc_en: Spam score of the destination URL.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.title_zh: 目标 URL 的垃圾分。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.desc_en: Final URL the destination redirects to, if any.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.url_to_.title_zh: 目标若发生重定向，则最终跳转到的 URL。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_indi.desc_en: Whether the link reaches the target indirectly via a redirect or canonical chain.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.is_indi.title_zh: 该链接是否经由重定向或 canonical 链间接到达目标。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.desc_en: The redirect/canonical hops the indirect link passes through to reach the target.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.title_zh: 间接链接到达目标所经过的重定向/canonical 跳转路径。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.desc_en: URL of the page this item describes.
tasks.result.page_intersection.1.indirec.title_zh: 该条目所描述页面的 URL。

tasks.result.summary.title_zh: 该条目交集统计的汇总。

tasks.result.summary.intersections_count.desc_en: Number of targets this item intersects with.
tasks.result.summary.intersections_count.title_zh: 该条目所交集的目标数量。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.

tasks.result.items.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.

tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).

tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
