target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

network_address_type.desc_en: Whether referring networks are grouped by individual IP (`ip`) or by subnet (`subnet`).
network_address_type.title_zh: 引荐网络的归并粒度：按单个 IP（`ip`）或按子网（`subnet`）。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tasks.result.crawled_pages.desc_en: Number of the target's pages crawled by DataForSEO.
tasks.result.crawled_pages.title_zh: DataForSEO 已抓取的目标页面数量。

tasks.result.info.desc_en: Host and technology information about the target.
tasks.result.info.title_zh: 目标的主机与技术信息。

tasks.result.info.server.desc_en: Web server software reported for the host.
tasks.result.info.server.title_zh: 主机上报的 Web 服务器软件。

tasks.result.info.cms.title_zh: 检测到的内容管理系统（CMS）。

tasks.result.info.platform_type.desc_en: Platform type(s) detected for the page (e.g. cms, blogs).
tasks.result.info.platform_type.title_zh: 页面检测到的平台类型（如 cms、blogs）。

tasks.result.info.ip_address.desc_en: IP address of the target host.
tasks.result.info.ip_address.title_zh: 目标主机的 IP 地址。

tasks.result.info.country.desc_en: Country associated with the target host.
tasks.result.info.country.title_zh: 目标主机关联的国家/地区。

tasks.result.info.is_ip.desc_en: Whether the target is addressed by a bare IP rather than a domain name.
tasks.result.info.is_ip.title_zh: 目标是否以裸 IP（而非域名）寻址。

tasks.result.info.target_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score computed for the target host.
tasks.result.info.target_spam_score.title_zh: 针对目标主机计算的垃圾分。

tasks.result.internal_links_count.desc_en: Number of internal links on the page.
tasks.result.internal_links_count.title_zh: 页面上的内部链接数量。

tasks.result.external_links_count.desc_en: Number of external links on the page.
tasks.result.external_links_count.title_zh: 页面上的外部链接数量。

tasks.result.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.referring_domains_nofollow.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.referring_domains_nofollow.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.referring_main_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.referring_main_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.referring_main_domains_nofo.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.referring_main_domains_nofo.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.referring_links_platform_ty.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.referring_links_semantic_lo.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.referring_links_semantic_lo.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.referring_links_countries.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.referring_links_countries.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.referring_pages_nofollow.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.referring_pages_nofollow.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

target.desc_en: Domain whose new/lost timeseries summary you want, specified without `http(s)://` and without `www.`.
target.title_zh: 要查询新增/丢失时间序列汇总的域名，去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.` 填写。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time range (format `yyyy-mm-dd`); if omitted, the endpoint's minimum supported date is used.
date_from.title_zh: 时间范围起始日期（格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`）；不填则使用该接口支持的最小日期。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time range (format `yyyy-mm-dd`); if omitted, today's date is used.
date_to.title_zh: 时间范围结束日期（格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`）；不填则默认到今天。

group_range.desc_en: Bucket size for aggregating the timeseries: `day`, `week`, `month` or `year`; week/month/year items are stamped with the last day of each full period, and empty periods return 0.
group_range.title_zh: 时间序列的聚合粒度：`day`、`week`、`month` 或 `year`；周/月/年的条目以各完整周期的最后一天标记，无数据的周期返回 0。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。
